title: No Skin For Watut
description: Removes the cool lumberjack guy from interface!
body:
## Removes The Cool Lumberjack Guy From All Interfaces!
Don't you want to see this cool lumberjack guy on your friend's interface from the What Are They Up To mod? Then this is for you!

Lumberjack skin always showing even if you have another skin so it removes the complexity!
